user_query: I want to explore the beauty of poetry by learning about famous poets, their notable works, and different poetic forms and techniques.

TaskList.description: Fetch information about famous poets and their notable works.
Fetch information about different poetic forms and techniques.
Compile the information from steps 1 and 2 into a comprehensive overview.
Fetch online posts related to poetry, including discussions on poets and poetic forms.
Summarize the details of the fetched posts.
